feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: EWM Component staging not initiated
entry.content:
Hello experts.

We are implementing EWM in public cloud. In our system we stage using material independent control cycle using pick part strategy as shown:

Now, what we do is, after release of production orders, we go to functions -> WM Material Staging -> Execute. When we do that we see that the documents generated in the process posting change item app as shown below:

So our customizing system is working fine. Now we are in test system and what we are noticing is when we execute the staging, the quantity is not requested as shown in the simulation below:

In the log I see the message: Message 118 - Batch verification no required, although possible in WM (pick parts):

We have never seen this message in customizing system. Also one more thing I have noticed that in the component view 'Change Process Type' field is marked as 1 (Manually Changed):

In customizing system I have seen this field is blank.

Could you please help me understand what is the root cause of this issue? Why am I not able to execute the staging process? Any help/insight will be highly appreciated.

 

Thank you

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: GL Account not available as Preconditition for Market Segment Substitution
entry.content:
In S4HC Public, in the app Manage Substitution and Validation Rules (Market Segment Business context), we need to create a substitution whose precondition is a given GL Account. Unfortunately, this field is not available in the list (see capture 1 attached).

However, the GL account is available for the substitutions done through the custom logic BADI FINS_MARKET_SEGMENT_SUB (Market Segment Extension Fields Substitution).

 
 
Is it a mistake and SAP forgot to include GL account to be used in the app Manage Substitution?
We don't want to create custom field ZZ_glaccount and populate it using the before mentioned custom logic, as proposed for other issues as "clean core solution". Do we need to raise a note/incidence to SAP?
 
Thanks. Regards,

entry.title: Custom Business Object OData call failing with SYSTEM_NO_ROLL error when fetching x-csrf-token
entry.content:
We have a Custom Business Object (CBO) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition that works correctly in one system but fails in another after transport.

When testing the OData service via Postman, the GET request used to fetch the x-csrf-token returns a SYSTEM_NO_ROLL runtime error. The same logic works in a system with smaller data volume.

The short dump shows:

  • Runtime Error: SYSTEM_NO_ROLL
  • Category: Resource bottleneck
  • Error location: /IWCOR/CL_DS_EP_WRITER_XML
  • Message: Memory request could not be completed

The issue initially appeared to be related to CSRF token retrieval, but further analysis suggests the error occurs during response serialization.

What is the root cause of this behavior and what is the recommended solution?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Confirmation of Scope Item 5XU activation and Basic Statutory Reporting
entry.content:
1)The Tax Procedure 0TXIN exists in our Quality System. Does this indicate that Scope Item 5XU is fully active?

2. Availability of Basic Statutory Reports
The "Basic Compliance Reporting" functionalities included in the standard license. is it possible to generate the following minimum required tax reports using the "Run Statutory Reports" (App ID: F1515) app?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to enable Joule for the SAC Tenant Owner in S4 public cloud?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I'm looking for a solution of the problem I'm currently facing.

I went through the whole Blog and got it done to setup the connection between SAC and Joule in S4 Public Cloud.... but only for a regular user (with BI Admin and Admin role), but not for the SAC tenant Owner (who has no roles).

The first time, this was the result of reading the users, like described in step 4.5 Schedule User and Group Provisioning (optional)

Not sure what the real root cause was... I had the feeling that only users with roles are processed, so I put myself (the owner) into a Team and assigned the Admin roles to the team.

In the second try, it looks like also my user got processed:

However, in S4 public Cloud, when I try to get answer from a SAC model by Joule, I'm asked if my question is related to Ledger 0L and which Company Code ... and that get the information that Joule would not be able to access any SAC tenant.

In contrast to that, my colleague is able to get analytical answers from SAC.... so the whole setup basically works!

Did anybody experience the same issue and did find a solution?

Addition: No, I have no API Access Users in my tenant. This is a fresh TDD SAC, where only 2 Users and 1 Team exists.

Thanks a lot, Martin

entry.title: 'Function SUMGT is unknown' error in Custom Analytical Query
entry.content:
I am trying to create a Custom analytical query using Custom CDS view for a report. Through Custom analytical query and services, I am using SUMGT for calculated Measure, on which I am getting 'Function SUMGT is unknown' in the error logs. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Request for standard production reporting apps
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support Team,

We would like to request your support to identify standard SAP Fiori reporting applications in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud that provide simplified and user-friendly production reporting, especially for process manufacturing scenarios.

Currently, the COOISPI report is available in the system; however, business users find it complex and difficult to interpret, particularly for day-to-day operational analysis. For this reason, the users are looking for more intuitive reporting applications, similar in concept to the informative and analytical apps available in the QM module, but focused on production execution.

The main business requirements are to:

  • Easily visualize total quantities produced over a given period
  • Optionally compare total produced quantities vs Planned Independent Requirements (PIRs)
  • Access production information in a summary and user-friendly format, without having to navigate order by order

The focus is informational repor

entry.title: Confirming quantities with the EAN of the item at EWM level with Handheld in SAP HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
The client's requirement is to scan their barcodes to automate the process of recording incoming quantities. Currently, EWM is being implemented through the Test RF Environment app.

Warehouse number: 5550
Resource: SHA1-1
DefPressDvc: SE01
Press Enter.

Select  03 Inbound Process > 02 Receiving of HUs > 01 Rec. Hu By Delivery

In the Delivery field, enter your delivery number. 180000265.

The incoming delivery is now displayed with the following information:
Delivery: 180000265.
Partner (number and name): 1000060
Number of handling units (number of handling units created so far): 1
Press Enter to continue.

I need to the scan the HU in this field.

At the IM level, there's a button that you click to enable the device's camera to scan the barcode. My question is, does this require configuration or is it done through an API?

entry.title: "Net Price must be greater than 0 for all items." error during quotation submission
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have created a RFQ with multiple items and send to the supplier. When supplier send the quotes, it was sent only for few items. During the quotation creation for the supplier, it doesn't allow me to submit the quotation for the blank price items as quotes were not sent for them.
While submitting I'm getting the below error.
"Net Price must be greater than 0 for all items."

How do I over come this, as of now I use 0.01 for the price for the unquoted items as a workaround but it is not acceptable from business.
Thanks

entry.title: Different Posting Date and Tax Reporting Date Billing (Finance)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

in the standard behavior (when creating a sales order and subsequent billing document), the following dates are the same:
Billing Date = Posting Date = Tax Reporting Date

Requirement:
We would like to achieve the following scenario:

  • Posting Date = last year

  • Tax Reporting Date = today

Is there any standard way or configuration to separate the Posting Date and the Tax Reporting Date in Public Cloud?

I already tried using the Date of Services Rendered, but unfortunately this did not change the Tax Reporting Date as expected.

Thanks a lot in advance for your support!

Best regards
Kathi

entry.title: Customer Master Data street4 CDS view not released
entry.content:
We need this field for a Form,

Data Element: AD_STRSPP3, Description: Street4, Data type: CHAR, Lenght: 40. 

It is inside two CDS views not released: I_AddressPostalAddress and I_BusinessPartnerAddress. Is it possible to release at least one of the two?

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Badi to maintain Attachment as mandatory at SES Level
entry.content:
is there any Badi to maintain Attachment as PERSON_NAME at SES Level.

entry.title: Required Purchase Requisition Print similar to PO
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We need Purchase Requisition Print similar to PO, Please provide us the FORM for PR, or let us know how get the printout of PR

Thanks

Rajendra Patil

SAP MM Consultant

entry.title: FI: Openning balance upload
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is it possible to upload the past one year of historical data into the SAP system with full integration and interlinking across all relevant modules?

Kindly advise on the feasibility and any prerequisites or limitations we should consider.

Best Regards,

Nithin

entry.title: Change description of Special GL Indicator
entry.content: "Change special GL indicator description for special GL C "Value-Dated Bank Transfer" to " Interest Payable"In SAP there is configuration node to change description of special GL indicator. Is there any option to change it in the backend.

entry.title: Sales price condition in Customer Projects for Subcontractor
entry.content:
Hello

There is an issue with Subcontractor (contingent worker) Sales price condition for customer project.

If we maintain sales price 100 € per hour using personal number and WBS ID this condition is not appearing in planned revenue.

We used then this access sequence to maintain price 100 € and this condition calculated project planned revenue.

After this subcontracting PO has been created for 80€ per hour and timesheet enterted. But revenue is recognised 80€ from PO price not the 100€ sales price from project.

Now i created same test and maintained project sales rate 100€ per hour using access sequence project and personal number

PO is same 80€ per hour and this time timesheet entry recognized revenue from project sales price:

I am not able to understand the reason why revenue reconisition is correct only when sales price access sequence project and personal number. Please help.

entry.title: ksef portal is not accepting sap generated xml file
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

we are trying to upload an xml file which is  generated by sap and trying to upload in ksef portal directly as we have some issues to submit in e document cockpit .

It shows following error while uploading .

entry.title: Change customer in a professional services project
entry.content:
Hello, 

Does anyone know why it the customer field is locked in professional services projects after creation?
In my head it should not be a problem to change it when we are still in "planning" phase of the project.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Unable to add new data fields to the email template FIN_CUSINV_EMAIL_TEMPL
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We are unable to add new data fields to the email template FIN_CUSINV_EMAIL_TEMPL. We require two fields such as DocumentreferenceID and Customer name to include in the email. We are unable to find relevant business context to add new data fields to the template. 

Could you please provide a possible way to achieve to add required fields to the email template.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: What is the recommended learning roadmap for an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Administrator
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m currently working as an Administrator for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, and I’m looking for guidance on how to build a clear and structured learning roadmap for my professional development.

I have an active SAP Learning Hub subscription, so I would greatly appreciate recommendations on which Learning Journeys, courses, or certifications are most relevant for someone in my role.

My Objective

I want to understand which skills, topics, and SAP learning paths I should follow to grow from a foundational level to an advanced/expert level in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system administration.

Areas I want to focus on:

  • System administration and operations
  • Identity and access management (IAM)
  • Integrations (Communication Arrangements, APIs, SAP BTP services)
  • Extensibility (In-App and Side-by-Side)
  • Monitoring, lifecycle management, and support processes
  • Automation and operational tools
  • Best practices aligned with SAP Activate
  • Recommended certifications for administrators

 My Key Questions to the Community

  1. Which SAP Learning Journeys are essential for an S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition administrator?
  2. Is there a recommended end‑to‑end roadmap that shows how to progress from beginner to advanced?
  3. Which SAP certifications provide the most value for this career path?
  4. What combination of technical and functional skills should I prioritize to build a strong long‑term profile?
  5. Any practical advice or experiences from people who have followed a similar path?

I truly appreciate any insights, recommendations, or examples that can help me structure a solid career plan in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ecosystem.

Thank you very much!
